---
title: "Hyperparameter Sensitivity"
---

## What — Experiment Identity

- **Experiment**: measure model sensitivity to key hyperparameters and find the optimal configuration

## Why — Experiment Purpose

- **Claim addressed**: Claim 3 — the method is robust across a reasonable HP range

```{dot}
//| label: fig-hp-design
//| fig-cap: "HP sensitivity: per-parameter variance determines must-tune vs. safe-default"
//| fig-width: 7
//| fig-height: 3.2
digraph G {
  bgcolor="transparent"
  rankdir=TB
  graph [ranksep=0.55, nodesep=0.5]
  node [style=filled, fillcolor="#2c3035", color="#4a9eda",
        fontcolor="#f8f9fa", fontname="Arial", fontsize=11,
        shape=box, width=1.6, height=0.42]
  edge [color="#6c757d", penwidth=1.4]

  subgraph row1 {
    rank=same
    HS [label="HP Space",    fillcolor="#375a7f"]
    Opt [label="Optuna TPE", fillcolor="#375a7f"]
  }
  subgraph row2 {
    rank=same
    High [label="High Impact", fillcolor="#4a2040", color="#e74c3c"]
    Low  [label="Low Impact",  fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }
  subgraph row3 {
    rank=same
    Tune [label="Must Tune"]
    Safe [label="Safe Default"]
    Cfg  [label="Final Config", fillcolor="#1a4a3a", color="#00bc8c"]
  }

  HS  -> High  HS  -> Low
  Opt -> High  Opt -> Low
  High -> Tune  Low -> Safe
  Tune -> Cfg  Safe -> Cfg
}
```

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Datasets</strong></summary>

- **Dataset**: [same as main experiment]
- **Split**: [identical to main experiment]

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Hyperparameter Space</strong></summary>

| Parameter | Type | Range / Choices | Sampler |
|-----------|------|----------------|---------|
| `lr` | float (log) | [1e-4, 1e-1] | log-uniform |
| `hidden_dim` | int | {64, 128, 256, 512} | categorical |
| `num_layers` | int | [1, 6] | uniform int |
| `dropout` | float | [0.0, 0.5] | uniform |
| `weight_decay` | float (log) | [1e-5, 1e-2] | log-uniform |

Search tool: Optuna via `mode=optuna`; [N] trials, TPE sampler, MedianPruner.

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Evaluation Metrics</strong></summary>

| Metric | What it measures | Why chosen |
|--------|-----------------|------------|
| [Primary metric] | [same as main] | [optimisation objective] |
| Sensitivity σ | std across HP range per parameter | [measures robustness] |
| Best trial Δ | improvement over default config | [quantifies search value] |

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>How — Run Commands</strong></summary>

```bash
# Optuna HP search
python -m src.main mode=optuna optuna.n_trials=100 optuna.study_name=hp_study
# Results logged to MLflow and Optuna storage (outputs/optuna/)

# Robustness check: run best config with multiple seeds
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> seed=42
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> seed=0
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> seed=1
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> seed=7
python -m src.main dataset=<dataset> method=<method> seed=99
```

</details>

---

## Results

> Fill in after running. Summarise the most important findings.

### Best Configuration Found

```yaml
# Best trial config (from Optuna)
lr: <value>
hidden_dim: <value>
num_layers: <value>
dropout: <value>
weight_decay: <value>
```

- **Best trial metric**: [value] at trial #[N]
- **Improvement over default config**: [Δ metric]

### Sensitivity Analysis

| Parameter | Sensitivity | Safe default? | Interaction with |
|-----------|------------|--------------|-----------------|
| `lr` | — | — | `weight_decay` |
| `hidden_dim` | — | — | `num_layers` |
| `dropout` | — | — | dataset size |

---

## Analysis

<details>
<summary><strong>Robustness Check</strong></summary>

- **Stability across seeds**: run best config with seeds {42, 0, 1, 7, 99}; report std
- **Robustness claim**: method achieves [metric] ± [σ] — variance is acceptable for deployment
- **Failure modes**: performance degrades below [lr_min] or above [hidden_dim_max]

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>Recommended Config</strong></summary>

```bash
# Recommended production config derived from HP search
python -m src.main \
  dataset=<dataset> \
  method=<method> \
  method.lr=<best_lr> \
  method.hidden_dim=<best_hidden> \
  method.num_layers=<best_layers> \
  method.dropout=<best_dropout>
```

</details>

<details>
<summary><strong>Claim Status</strong></summary>

- **Claim 3 status**: ⬜ Pending — will be updated after runs complete
- **Key finding**: [placeholder — state the main robustness insight]

</details>
